rationale: Outward TokenKey brand surfaces that must stay converged: default SPA title, public README product heading, SPA document-title fallback, and the fifth-platform admin label (internal key remains `newapi`; user-facing copy is Extension Engine per docs/global/tokenkey-opc-transformation-plan.md §7.2). This registry intentionally does NOT ban `sub2api` / `newapi` where they are compatibility or routing identifiers.

sentinels.rationale: Default embedded SPA browser tab title before JS runs; regressing to Sub2API breaks the single-product narrative for every fresh load.
Public English README is the primary outbound product boundary; the H1 and overview sentence anchor the TokenKey brand for operators and integrators.
Chinese README H1 must stay aligned with the English product brand.
Japanese README H1 must stay aligned with the English product brand.
SPA `document.title` fallback when site_name is unset; drifting back to Sub2API re-splits admin tab branding from the embedded index.html default.
Fifth platform admin display label: degrades `newapi` from an external product name to Extension Engine while keeping the platform key `newapi` for routing/API.
